name: Quick & Easy Chocolate Frosting
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (broken into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate, stirring constantly.
2. Add marshmallows; stir frequently until melted and thick.
3. Spoon the mixture into a small mixing bowl.
4. Beat in the softened butter.
5. Gradually add milk, beating until smooth.
6. Gradually incorporate powdered sugar and vanilla extract, beating to the desired consistency.
7. The final amount of frosting will be about 2-1/4 cups.
